title: GPT-5.6: Frontier intelligence that scales with your ambition
summary: OpenAI made the GPT-5.6 model family generally available, led by Sol, with Terra and Luna aimed at balanced and cost-efficient use. The release emphasizes stronger coding, agentic workflows, programmatic tool calling, and higher-capability max and ultra reasoning modes.
friendlySummary: OpenAI released a new family of AI models. The models are designed to be better at coding, planning, using tools, and handling complex work.
whyItMatters: For teams already spending heavily on AI, the practical story is not just smarter answers but more useful work per dollar. The multi-agent and tool-calling features point toward AI systems that can complete longer jobs with less manual orchestration.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This could make AI more useful and more affordable for people and businesses that rely on it every day.
